title: DailyPopulation
description: A population / security-indicator measure for DOC — the census and accountability metrics DOC reports over time. Canonical schema reconciling the 'Local Law 33 - Security Indicators Report' (2wuc-x56b, rate per 100 ADP), aggregate counts derived from 'Daily Inmates In Custody' (7479-ugqb), 'Article 730 Transfer Waitlist' (q9w2-yi4x), and 'Medical Non-production for Clinic Appointments' (5n4h-km5r). Represents a single metric value for a period and (optionally) a facility.

metric.description: Metric name ('Metric') — e.g. 'Average Daily Population', 'Assault on Staff', 'Use of Force'.

ratePer100ADP.description: Rate per 100 Average Daily Population ('rate per 100 ADP'), where reported.

yearType.description: Calendar or fiscal year type ('Year Type' / 'calendar type').
